title: Venezuelan-Style Smoked Cod Ceviche
description: A light and refreshing Mexican-inspired dish made with smoked cod, marinated in a zesty mixture of lime juice and spices.
instructions: Rinse the cod under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, combine the lime juice, red onion, cilantro, diced tomatoes, and diced jalapeño.
Add the cod to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Just before serving, crush the dusted tortilla chips or tostadas to create crumbs.
Spoon the ceviche mixture onto the crushed tortillas or tostadas.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
